    A

    AlgorithmComparisonManager - Class in Unnamed Package
    Run multiple sequence scoring algorithms against the same query and database.
    AlgorithmComparisonManager(List) - Constructor for class AlgorithmComparisonManager
    Create a manager for a list of algorithms.

    C

    choose(File) - Static method in class DNASearchDemo
     
    compareAll(String, List) - Method in class AlgorithmComparisonManager
    Run all algorithms against the given query and database.
    constructor_ShouldThrowForNullAlgorithm() - Method in class SequenceMatcherTest
    Verifies that the matcher constructor rejects a null algorithm.

    D

    DNASearchComparison - Class in Unnamed Package
    Demonstrate searching a DNA database with multiple scoring algorithms.
    DNASearchComparison() - Constructor for class DNASearchComparison
     
    DNASearchDemo - Class in Unnamed Package
    Demonstrate searching a DNA database with multiple scoring algorithms.
    DNASearchDemo() - Constructor for class DNASearchDemo
     
    DNASequence - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represent one labeled DNA sequence in the database.
    DNASequence(String, String) - Constructor for class DNASequence
    Create a labeled DNA sequence.

    E

    ExamplePositionMatchAlgorithm - Class in Unnamed Package
    A simple example similarity algorithm.
    ExamplePositionMatchAlgorithm() - Constructor for class ExamplePositionMatchAlgorithm
     

    F

    findBestMatch(String, List) - Method in class SequenceMatcher
    Finds the best matching sequence in the database for the given query.
    findBestMatch_ShouldReturnBestMatch_WhenHigherScoreIsBetter() - Method in class SequenceMatcherTest
    Verifies that the matcher returns the best match when higher scores are better.
    findBestMatch_ShouldReturnBestMatch_WhenLowerScoreIsBetter() - Method in class SequenceMatcherTest
    Verifies that the matcher returns the best match when lower scores are better.
    findBestMatch_ShouldThrowForEmptyDatabase() - Method in class SequenceMatcherTest
    Verifies that an empty database causes an exception.
    findBestMatch_ShouldThrowForInvalidQuery() - Method in class SequenceMatcherTest
    Verifies that an invalid query sequence causes an exception.
    findBestMatch_ShouldThrowForNullDatabase() - Method in class SequenceMatcherTest
    Verifies that findBestMatch rejects a null database.
    findBestMatch_ShouldThrowForNullQuery() - Method in class SequenceMatcherTest
    Verifies that findBestMatch rejects a null query sequence.

    G

    getAlgorithmName() - Method in class MatchResult
    Returns the name of the algorithm used.
    getAlgorithms() - Method in class AlgorithmComparisonManager
    Return a defensive copy of the registered algorithms.
    getBestSequence() - Method in class MatchResult
    Returns the best matching sequence.
    getLabel() - Method in class DNASequence
    Return the label for this sequence.
    getName() - Method in class ExamplePositionMatchAlgorithm
    Returns the display name of this algorithm.
    getName() - Method in class Levenshtein
     
    getName() - Method in class LongestCommonSubsequence
    Returns the display name of this algorithm.
    getName() - Method in class LongestCommonSubstring
    Returns the display name of this algorithm.
    getName() - Method in interface SequenceScoringAlgorithm
    Returns the display name of this algorithm.
    getScore() - Method in class MatchResult
    Returns the score of the best matching sequence.
    getSequence() - Method in class DNASequence
    Return the normalized DNA sequence.

    H

    higherScoreIsBetter() - Method in class ExamplePositionMatchAlgorithm
    Indicate that larger scores are better matches.
    higherScoreIsBetter() - Method in class Levenshtein
     
    higherScoreIsBetter() - Method in class LongestCommonSubsequence
    Indicates that a higher score represents a better match.
    higherScoreIsBetter() - Method in class LongestCommonSubstring
    Indicates that a higher score represents a better match.
    higherScoreIsBetter() - Method in interface SequenceScoringAlgorithm
    Indicates whether larger scores are better matches.

    L

    Levenshtein - Class in Unnamed Package
    Algorithm that scores two DNA sequences using Levenshtein edit distance.
    Levenshtein() - Constructor for class Levenshtein
     
    LongestCommonSubsequence - Class in Unnamed Package
    Algorithm that scores two DNA sequences by the length of their longest common subsequence (the longest sequence of characters shared by both strings, not necessarily contiguous).
    LongestCommonSubsequence() - Constructor for class LongestCommonSubsequence
     
    LongestCommonSubstring - Class in Unnamed Package
    Algorithm that scores two DNA sequences by the length of their longest common substring (a contiguous sequence of characters shared by both strings).
    LongestCommonSubstring() - Constructor for class LongestCommonSubstring
     

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class DNASearchComparison
    Runs the DNA sequence matching comparison.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class DNASearchDemo
    Runs the example program.
    MatchResult - Class in Unnamed Package
    Store the result of a sequence search.
    MatchResult(String, DNASequence, double) - Constructor for class MatchResult
    Creates a match result.

    N

    normalizeAndValidate(String) - Static method in class DNASequence
    Normalize the input sequence and check that it contains only valid DNA bases.
    normalizeAndValidate_ShouldConvertToUppercase() - Method in class SequenceMatcherTest
    Verifies that sequence normalization converts lowercase input to uppercase.
    normalizeAndValidate_ShouldThrowForInvalidCharacter() - Method in class SequenceMatcherTest
    Verifies that invalid DNA characters are rejected.

    S

    score(String, String) - Method in class ExamplePositionMatchAlgorithm
    Counts matching positions between two DNA sequences up to the length of the shorter sequence.
    score(String, String) - Method in class Levenshtein
     
    score(String, String) - Method in class LongestCommonSubsequence
    Computes the length of the longest common subsequence between two DNA sequences using dynamic programming.
    score(String, String) - Method in class LongestCommonSubstring
    Computes the length of the longest common substring between two DNA sequences using dynamic programming.
    score(String, String) - Method in interface SequenceScoringAlgorithm
    Computes a score between a database sequence and a query sequence.
    score_ShouldCountMatchingPositions() - Method in class SequenceMatcherTest
    Verifies that the example algorithm counts matching positions correctly.
    SequenceMatcher - Class in Unnamed Package
    Searches a database of DNA sequences using a provided scoring algorithm.
    SequenceMatcher(SequenceScoringAlgorithm) - Constructor for class SequenceMatcher
    Creates a matcher that uses the given scoring algorithm.
    SequenceMatcherTest - Class in Unnamed Package
    Tests for the SequenceMatcher class.
    SequenceMatcherTest() - Constructor for class SequenceMatcherTest
     
    SequenceScoringAlgorithm - Interface in Unnamed Package
    Defines the behavior for a DNA sequence scoring algorithm.

    T

    toString() - Method in class DNASequence
    Return a readable string representation of this object.
